originalTitle: Sudan drone attack on key hospital killed 64 people during Eid, WHO says
title: Sudan drone attack on key hospital killed 64 people during Eid, WHO says
content: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.

originalTitle: Kenyans fighting illegally for Russia in Ukraine to be granted amnesty
title: Kenyans fighting illegally for Russia in Ukraine to be granted amnesty
content: It is illegal for Kenyans to serve in foreign armies and can carry a sentence of up to 10 years in jail.

title: 'Peace is a gradual thing': How land, cattle and identity fuel a deadly Nigerian conflict
content: How a lack of justice and trust in the security forces perpetuates deadly violence in Plateau state.

title: Vinicius strikes twice as Real Madrid edge Atletico 3-2 in pulsating derby
content: Real stay within four points of league leaders Barcelona with hard-fought win in Madrid derby.

title: Who’s left running Iran?
content: Much of the top leadership has been eliminated, but the country is still fighting.

originalTitle: Slovenia’s Freedom Movement Party takes narrow election lead: Exit poll
title: Slovenia’s Freedom Movement Party takes narrow election lead: Exit poll
content: Governing liberals edge ahead of opposition conservatives in a race too close to call, according to exit poll.

title: Israeli settlers target Palestinian villages in occupied West Bank, attacking people and properties
content: The violence began after 18-year-old settler Yehuda Sherman was killed after reportedly being hit by a vehicle driven by a Palestinian while on his quad bike.

title: Guardiola's dance of joy as Man City pile pressure on desolate Arsenal

originalTitle: The 'sentimental' goalkeeping call that cost Arsenal
title: The 'sentimental' goalkeeping call that cost Arsenal
content: There is no hiding place for a manager when your decisions go wrong, and Mikel Arteta's call to stick by cup goalkeeper Kepa Arrizabalaga will haunt him.
